title: ficus cumingii var. worcesteri
intro: Ficus cumingii var. worcesteri, also known as the Bataan balete or Philippine balete tree, is a variety of the fig tree species. It is a deciduous tree that has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The leaves of the Ficus cumingii var. worcesteri plant have been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to their health benefits of reducing inflammation and improving immune function. In herbal preparations, the leaves are often made into teas or infusions, or used in decoctions to treat a range of ailments.
